docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-23-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $140.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CCD LAW GROUP, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF SHUJUAN WU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF HUANUA LI IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER, REBECCA CHAU, OATH ON FILE. DEFENDANT JOHN J. CHOW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DARIS CHAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CCD LAW GROUP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DARIS CHAN. ALL THREE PROOFS OF SERVICES ARE UNTIMELY BY 3 DAYS. ***DEFENDANT'S WAIVE SERVICE ISSUES*** NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-13-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, JOHN J.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY WU, SHUJUAN LI, HUANHUA AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, JOHN J. CHAN, DARIUS CCD LAW GROUP, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, SHUJUAN LI, HUANHUA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHOW, JOHN J. CHAN, DARIUS CCD LAW GROUP, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. DEFENDANT WILL NOT SEEK FURTHER PAYMENT FROM PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-13-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, DARIUS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DARIUS CHAN, CEO FILED BY DEFENDANT CCD LAW GROUP, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2026 - JUDGMENT.
